title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) behind a simple CLI & REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API (Node & browsers).

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM/Chat/Embeddings endpoints.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, multi-user).

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Interactive TUI wrapper around Ollama with chat history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for chatting with Ollama models from Ruby/Rails apps.

title: ollama-ai npm package
summary: Lightweight Node wrapper for Ollama REST endpoints with TypeScript types.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators in pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI backend, Next.js chat, Discord bot, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) for Ollama server.

title: ollama-chat-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that talks to Ollama with session memory.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for note Q&A and summarization.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama with async client and SSE streaming.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module providing injectable Ollama service with config.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.
